_comment: SanMar catalog filter rules. Edit this file anytime and the next nightly sync will apply your changes.
_markup_comment: Applied to SanMar case_price (and case_sale_price when active). 50 = × 1.5 multiplier. Markup applies to blanks only, NOT to decoration.
_discontinued_comment: If false, items with product_status = 'Discontinued' are dropped.
_coming_soon_comment: If false, items with product_status = 'Coming Soon' are dropped. SanMar warns these items may have incomplete data.
_category_whitelist_comment: If non-empty, ONLY items whose CATEGORY_NAME matches one of these are kept. Case-insensitive. Examples: ['T-Shirts', 'Polos/Knits', 'Sweatshirts/Fleece', 'Caps', 'Bags']. Leave empty to allow all categories.
_category_blacklist_comment: Items whose CATEGORY_NAME matches any of these are dropped. Applied after whitelist. Examples: ['Workwear', 'Infant & Toddler'].
_style_whitelist_comment: If non-empty, ONLY these style numbers are kept. Case-insensitive. Example: ['PC54', 'G500', 'DT6000'].
_style_blacklist_comment: These style numbers are dropped. Applied after whitelist. Example: ['BADSTYLE1', 'BADSTYLE2'].
_brand_whitelist_comment: If non-empty, ONLY these brands (MILL field) are kept. Case-insensitive. Example: ['PORT & COMPANY', 'GILDAN', 'BELLA+CANVAS'].
_brand_blacklist_comment: These brands are dropped. Applied after whitelist.
_price_filter_comment: Optional price range filter (applied to case_price before markup). null = no limit.
_image_comment: If true, drops any product where no color has at least one image URL. Products without images can't be rendered in the calculator.
_custom_comment: If true, reads custom-products.xlsx and merges those rows into products.json. See custom-products.xlsx template for the schema.
